title: End Flash - World Leaders Edition
description: You will always be able to see Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong Un in The End
body:
### What this resource pack does:
**This pack replaces the default end flash texture in Minecraft with unusual image of world leaders - Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong Un.**

### Why you might want to download it:
**If you’re looking to add humor and surrealism to your Minecraft world, this resource pack is a fun choice. It brings an unexpected twist to survival or creative gameplay, making it great for silly playthroughs, streams, or just entertaining your friends with something truly bizarre.**
